faqs.question: What types of ants are most common in Seaford, NY?
faqs.answer: Seaford homeowners most frequently encounter carpenter ants, pavement ants, odorous house ants, and pharaoh ants. Carpenter ants are particularly concerning in Long Island's older wooden structures, while pavement ants are common around driveways and sidewalks. Our technicians identify the specific species during inspection to ensure targeted, effective treatment.
